
```{r}
all$log10GenesPerUMI <- log10(all$nFeature_RNA) / log10(all$nCount_RNA)
#add this line of code first to prevent the NA in mitoRatio 
all[["nFeature_RNA"]] <- colSums(x = all, slot = "counts")
all$mitoRatio <- PercentageFeatureSet(object = all, pattern = "^mt-")
all$mitoRatio <- all@meta.data$mitoRatio / 100
metadata <- all@meta.data

metadata$cells <- rownames(metadata)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::rename(seq_folder = orig.ident,
                nUMI = nCount_RNA,
                nGene = nFeature_RNA)
all@meta.data <- metadata

all <- subset(x = all, nUMI >= 500)
table(all@meta.data$status)
table(all@meta.data$status)
all <- subset(x = all,
                          subset= (nUMI >= 500) &
                            (nGene >= 250) &
                            (log10GenesPerUMI > 0.80) &
                            (mitoRatio < 0.20))
all <- NormalizeData(all)
all <- FindVariableFeatures(all, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000)
all <- ScaleData(all)
all <- RunPCA(all, npcs = 30)

# Run UMAP
all <- RunUMAP(all, dims = 1:30, reduction = "pca")
```
